name: io.github.chrischall/honeybook-mcp
description: HoneyBook client-portal MCP server for Claude — view contracts and invoices from wedding vendors

environmentVariables.name: HONEYBOOK_VENDORS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of vendor slugs (e.g. silk_veil,photog). Each slug must have matching HB_<SLUG>_AUTH_TOKEN, HB_<SLUG>_USER_ID, HB_<SLUG>_TRUSTED_DEVICE, HB_<SLUG>_FINGERPRINT, and HB_<SLUG>_PORTAL_ORIGIN env vars. Run `npm run auth` to capture.
